narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp N (precinct in Warren County) has 967 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
